MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT Location_Home__dlm.Id__c AS salesforce_location_id__c, Location_Home__dlm.Name__c AS location_name__c, 'INR' AS currency_iso_code__c, MAX(TRY_CONVERT_CURRENCY(Location_Home__dlm.Estimated_Setup_Cost_c__c, Location_Home__dlm.cdp_sys_record_currency__c, 'INR')) / MAX(TRY_CONVERT_CURRENCY(Location_Home__dlm.Projected_Revenue_c__c, Location_Home__dlm.cdp_sys_record_currency__c, 'INR')) / 12 / 0.65 AS payback_period_years__c FROM Location_Home__dlm GROUP BY Location_Home__dlm.Id__c, Location_Home__dlm.Name__c, 'INR'
